name: sentinel-supervisor
description: Run local Sentinel supervisor/coder workflows from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding tasks to local Sentinel.
interface.longDescription: Runs the locally installed Sentinel binary, monitors .supervisor state files, reports progress in Codex, and summarizes final code changes.
defaultPrompt: Use Sentinel Supervisor to run TASK.md.
Run this task through Sentinel with supervisor/coder and keep me updated.
